name: dj-music
description: DJ techno library management — MCP server with 20+ tools, audio analysis, set building, render pipeline
author: Evgeny Gurin
args: project_root="$PWD"; plugin_root="${AGY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$PWD}"; cd "$plugin_root" || exit 1; set -a; if [ -f "$project_root/.env" ]; then . "$project_root/.env"; elif [ -f .env ]; then . .env; fi; set +a; exec uv run -- fastmcp run fastmcp.json --no-banner
